diagrams.title: Hierarchical Directory Structure
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing root directory branching into subdirectories and files
elements: Home, bin, etc as first-level directories
diagrams.purpose: Understand parent-child relationships and path navigation

diagrams.title: Two-Level Directory Structure
diagrams.description: MFD pointing to multiple UFDs, each representing a user
diagrams.purpose: Visualize user isolation in two-level system

diagrams.title: Acyclic Graph Directory with Shared Links
diagrams.description: Graph showing directories linked to common subdirectory without cycles

diagrams.title: Path Resolution: Absolute vs Relative
diagrams.description: Ladder diagram comparing absolute path from root vs relative from current
